notes: Bindle components live as TOP items in their respective search piles. Contents pile holds 5 options drawn one-at-a-time. Other items are scattered in piles. Spec: lore/_TAROT_GAUNTLET.md §IV.5, §IV.13.

under_counter.label: Under the Counter
under_counter.notes: Working-shift detritus. The stuff the next manager would throw away if they ever found it.

pay_phone.label: Pay Phone
pay_phone.notes: Things people leave behind when the call doesn't go through.

card_wall.label: The Card Wall
card_wall.notes: Patrons leave tarot cards pinned to the wall over decades. Yours is somewhere in here.

jukebox.label: Jukebox (B-side selections)
jukebox.notes: Three tracks have been programmed into the box. Selecting one swaps the diner's BGM until another is chosen. Tracks are reusable — playing them does NOT consume the slot.

order_window.label: Order Window (the cook's queue)
order_window.notes: LIVE QUEUE. LISTEN-ing to a visitor places their order here as PENDING. ADDRESS THE BELL marks the oldest pending order READY. PICK UP at this space only takes READY orders.

stick.title: The Stick
stick.flavor: Broken broom handle propped against the freezer for eleven years. Nobody has thrown it away. Nobody has used it.

cloth.title: The Cloth
cloth.flavor: A cloth napkin folded for the next customer. The creases are permanent.

contents_pocket_money.title: Pocket Money From the Till
contents_pocket_money.flavor: Twelve years of unpaid hours, finally taken.

contents_cassette_spine.title: The Cassette Spine — JOHN_47AM_3
contents_cassette_spine.flavor: Elicia archived you while you slept on your feet.

contents_scratched_penny.title: A Scratched Penny From Your Apron
contents_scratched_penny.flavor: The smallest weight that's still mine.

contents_note_from_booth_six.title: A Note From Booth 6
contents_note_from_booth_six.flavor: The message that was meant for me.

contents_graffiti_tag.title: The Graffiti Tag From the Table
contents_graffiti_tag.flavor: FRANKLY / FOOLISH. Scratched twenty years ago. Taken back.

card_within_card.title: The Card Within the Card
card_within_card.flavor: A small printed Fool, pinned to the booth wall.

passive_effects.text: The stranger watched you read it.

fluorescent_strip.title: The Fluorescent Strip
fluorescent_strip.flavor: The metronome of the ceiling tile.

tip_jar_quarters.title: Tip-Jar Quarters
tip_jar_quarters.flavor: What you didn't declare. Sixty-three of them, sticky from cola.

apron_keyring.title: The Apron Keyring
apron_keyring.flavor: Every key for every door you stopped opening. Walk-in. Office. The bar. The lockbox you were never shown.

passive_effects.note: +1 die on any threshold roll while held

back_office_clock_key.title: The Back-Office Clock Key
back_office_clock_key.flavor: Reset the punch clock. Just this once. Nobody will check tomorrow because tomorrow isn't yours.

payphone_quarter.title: The Payphone Quarter
payphone_quarter.flavor: Heads up. A call goes out. Someone comes faster.

wrong_number_slip.title: Wrong-Number Slip
wrong_number_slip.flavor: Whoever they wanted, it wasn't you. A small relief, dialed in a strange hand.

coiled_handset_cord.title: The Coiled Handset Cord
coiled_handset_cord.flavor: It curls back like it's trying to remember a number. You hold it. You don't dial.

tarot_pin.title: The Tarot Pin
tarot_pin.flavor: A brass pin from the bottom-left corner of someone else's Fool. You wear it. The deck notices.

patron_signed_fool.title: The Patron-Signed Fool
patron_signed_fool.flavor: Someone wrote WE SEE YOU on the back. Twelve years ago. In your handwriting.

order_coffee_toast.title: Coffee and Toast
order_coffee_toast.flavor: Black, no sugar. Two slices wheat, scraped of butter where you scraped too much off.

order_cajun_skillet.title: Cajun Sausage Skillet
order_cajun_skillet.flavor: Andouille rounds and bell pepper, hashbrowns crisped in their grease. The third burner has to be lit for this.

order_grits_eggs_gravy.title: Grits, Eggs, Gravy
order_grits_eggs_gravy.flavor: The flat-rate breakfast. Eggs over hard. Gravy from the morning's roux.

order_togo_chicken_waffles.title: TO-GO · Chicken and Waffles
order_togo_chicken_waffles.flavor: Wrapped in butcher paper. Two waffles syrup-sealed, a thigh and a wing wrapped in foil. The ticket says: PARKING LOT, ANY CAR.

pinned_hermit_below.title: The Hermit, Pinned Below the Fool
pinned_hermit_below.flavor: A second card under yours. Whoever pinned it knew something about the order of things.

track_cicadas_dusk.title: B-Side · CICADAS AT DUSK
track_cicadas_dusk.flavor: The summer drone of insects, recorded outside this diner in 1987. Whoever cut the master is dead.

track_riverboat_drone.title: B-Side · RIVERBOAT DRONE
track_riverboat_drone.flavor: Low engines and water. The boat that takes nobody from the river window.

track_warehouse_drone.title: B-Side · WAREHOUSE DRONE
track_warehouse_drone.flavor: Forty hertz of empty room. The track that sounds like the diner already does.

unlockable_items_from_other_arcana.title: AUDI ET TACE Luggage Tag
unlockable_items_from_other_arcana.flavor: AVDI ET TACE. Listen and be silent.

unlockable_items_from_other_arcana.title: The Painted Pose
unlockable_items_from_other_arcana.flavor: John is in a painting in a room he'll never enter.

unlockable_items_from_other_arcana.title: The Charioteer's Sysop Handle
unlockable_items_from_other_arcana.flavor: DOA. Inheritance pending. You can log in.

unlockable_items_from_other_arcana.title: A Number-of-the-Counter Slip
unlockable_items_from_other_arcana.flavor: A receipt with a four-digit hand-written number on it.
